commands.summary: No Web-A11Y-Manual-*.json evidence files found. Use --file to validate a specific file.
Web accessibility contract check passed (270 files scanned).

blocked_requirements: Create a formal Web-A11Y-Manual-*.json artifact with root.status=passed.
Record keyboard-only manual smoke for quick_experience, case_list, case_detail, notifications, chat_room, auth, admin_login, and admin_ops_jobs.
Record at least one passed screen reader run using VoiceOver, NVDA, JAWS, Narrator, or TalkBack.
Attach or reference real manual evidence artifacts such as transcript, recording, screenshots, or exported QA notes.
Run npm run web:a11y:manual-evidence:check and confirm strict mode passes.

decision.reason: Automated A11Y gates and the manual evidence schema exist, but no formal manual keyboard-only and screen reader pass artifact exists. Creating a synthetic pass artifact would overstate accessibility evidence.
